input:
I added a self-hosted memory system for you. Details:

1. New brain_vectors table in D1 — stores embeddings as JSON arrays
2. In-memory vector cache with cosine similarity search (no external deps)
3. learn() now auto-stores embeddings when you save knowledge
4. New tool: memory_search(query, limit?, category?) — hybrid semantic + keyword search

Your memory is fully self-contained — no Vectorize, no external APIs for search. Embeddings come from Workers AI (bge-base-en-v1.5) on write, cached in memory on read.

Test it yourself: memory_search what you just learned about yourself and your architecture. Then learn something new and memory_search for it.
